no_unit_set_prefix: No unit is set for this metric. You can assign one from the
no_time_series_to_inspect: No time series found for this metric to inspect.
first_align_select: First, align the data by selecting a
inspect_new_or_reset: You can inspect a new metric or reset the query builder.
tutorial_completed: 🎉 Ta-da! You have completed your metric query tutorial.
welcome_inspector: 👋 Hello, welcome to the Metrics Inspector
showing_attributes_tooltip: Showing attributes for the selected time range
active_time_series_tooltip: Active time series are those that have received data points in the last 1 hour.
highlights_error: Something went wrong while fetching metric highlights
search_metrics_placeholder: Search your metrics. Try service.name='api' to see all API service metrics, or http.client for HTTP client metrics.
table_tooltip: The table displays all metrics in the selected time range. Each row represents a unique metric, and its metric name, and metadata like description, type, unit, and samples/timeseries cardinality observed in the selected time range.
query_no_results: This query had no results. Edit your query and try again!
error_fetching_metrics: Error fetching metrics. If the problem persists, please contact support.
treemap_tooltip: The treemap displays the proportion of samples/timeseries in the selected time range. Each tile represents a unique metric, and its size indicates the percentage of samples/timeseries it contributes to the total.
empty_select_metric: Select a metric and run a query to see the results
